next_steps: Renal biopsy with light, immunofluorescence, and electron microscopy
Serum complement levels (C3, C4) and ANA/anti-dsDNA testing
24-hour urine collection for total protein quantification
Initiation of ACE inhibitor or ARB for proteinuria management
Optimization of thyroid replacement therapy for subclinical hypothyroidism
Perform renal biopsy with light microscopy, immunofluorescence, and electron microscopy
Order full autoimmune workup including ANA, dsDNA, and serum complement levels (C3, C4)
Discontinue ibuprofen immediately to prevent further renal injury and sodium retention
Initiate ACE inhibitor or ARB for antiproteinuric therapy
Start treatment for subclinical hypothyroidism with levothyroxine
Obtain a full lipid panel and albumin levels
Monitor renal function and electrolytes closely while titrating diuretics
